name: arthritis
title: best herbal teas for arthritis
description: Achillea millefolium tea contains bioactive constituents such as saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to alleviate the symptoms of arthritis. The tea's anti-inflammatory properties are attributed to its ability to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes and cytokines, thereby reducing pain and swelling in the joints.
